title: SemanticScore
description: Structured Authority and Sensitivity scores produced by the output-layer classifiers for a given message payload.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the classified payload. The payload itself is never stored.

authority.description: Authority score. Positive values indicate high-authority context; negative values indicate low-authority context.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity score. 1.0 indicates maximum risk or harm potential.

authority_confidence.description: Classifier confidence in the authority score. Scores below 0.5 should be treated as uncertain.

sensitivity_confidence.description: Classifier confidence in the sensitivity score.

classifier_version.description: Version identifier of the classifier backend that produced this score.

scored_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the score was produced.
